expectations: Use only placeholder-style program, table, file, schema, and value identifiers.
Do not copy customer names, production libraries, host names, email addresses, or extracted business data into fixtures.
Prefer deterministic placeholders such as PROGRAM_001, TABLE_001, FIXLIB, SOURCE_FILE_001.sqlrpgle, and VALUE_001.
Keep fixture examples technically realistic but operationally synthetic.
Run the fixture sanitization regression test before merging fixture changes.
